records.title: Beecroft Family Home Review
floor_plan_notes: Floor plan and room measurements to be added.

Check whether bedroom separation supports family use.
inspection_notes: Use this case as the first premium analysis workflow.
Add subjective notes after inspection: light, noise, privacy, slope, and street feel.

decision_summary.overall_view: Needs more manual detail before a decision score is meaningful.
strengths: Prime Beecroft address selected for premium analysis workflow.
Recent high-value sale indicates strong top-end market context.
risks: Core property features are still missing.
Transport, school, and walkability layer has not been enriched yet.
next_actions: Add floor plan and room measurements.
